title: Set a Reminder
summary: Set a useful reminder on a phone or calendar so you do not forget an important task.
learnerPromise: You will be able to set a reminder on your phone or digital calendar that alerts you at the right time.
whyItMatters: Reminders reduce the mental effort of remembering everything. They help you show up on time, meet deadlines, and follow through on small but important tasks.
realLifeUses: Remind yourself to take medication at a certain time
Get an alert before a scheduled appointment or class
Remember to bring something important to school or work
Set a nudge to pay a bill or renew a subscription before it expires
materialsNeeded: Phone, tablet, or computer with a calendar or reminder app
result: A working reminder that will notify you at the chosen date and time.
youWillLearn: How to create a new reminder or event alert
How to choose a date and time that gives you enough notice
How to write a clear, specific reminder message
How to confirm the reminder is saved and will notify you
miniChallenge: Set one reminder for something you need to do within the next 3 days.
steps: Open your phone's built-in reminder, calendar, or task app.
Tap to create a new reminder or event.
Write a short, specific message about what you need to do.
Set the date and time for the reminder to alert you.
Save the reminder and check that it appears in your list.
completionCriteria: The reminder is saved and shows the correct date and time
The reminder message clearly describes the task
You can see it in your reminder or calendar list
commonProblems: Setting the wrong time or accidentally choosing a.m. instead of p.m.
Writing a vague message like 'do thing' and forgetting what it meant
Forgetting to turn on the notification or alarm sound
tips: Set the reminder for a time when you can actually act on it
Use specific words like 'Bring permission slip to school' instead of 'Bring stuff'
Consider setting a second reminder a few minutes earlier for extra important tasks
